meta.title: TiDAR 值得跟踪复现，但不能直接当作 serving 收益结论
meta.question: hybrid diffusion-autoregressive decoding 是否值得 model efficiency / serving 团队继续跟踪或复现？
meta.audience: 模型架构 / inference platform leaders

citations.title: TiDAR: Think in Diffusion, Talk in Autoregression
Figure 1: Latency Scaling over Token Slots
Table 5: Quality-efficiency Improvement from Full Masking

assets.caption_takeaway: H100 batch size 1 profiling shows a token-slot region where latency is almost flat before compute-bound growth.
Architecture figure shows one forward handling prior drafts and next-step pre-drafts.
Efficiency-quality plots compare TiDAR with AR, EAGLE-3 speculative decoding, and Block Diffusion.

kpis.context: single H100, downstream generative prompts, exact KV cache support

kpis.context: TiDAR Trust Diff 8B generative average vs Qwen3 8B 68.09%

sections.heading_claim: TiDAR 值得受控复现，但不应被包装成上线收益
sections.state_line: 论文最强信号是单模型架构下同时给出 4.71x/5.91x throughput speedup 与接近 AR 的质量，但 serving 结论受 batch=1、kernel、scheduler 和长上下文训练成本限制。

sections.heading_claim: 真正的问题是把空闲计算变成可信 token，而不是再讲一次 decoding 背景
sections.state_line: TiDAR 的服务价值前提来自 free token slots：一次 forward 可以携带更多 token 槽位而不立刻增加同等延迟。

blocks.caption_takeaway: Free-token-slot profiling is the serving assumption, not the serving result.

sections.heading_claim: 它补的是 draft capacity 与并行验证的缺口
sections.state_line: Table 1 把 TiDAR 与 speculative framework 放在同一张表：它的差异在 shared high-capacity drafter 与 parallel-to-verification，而不是只换一个 draft head。

sections.heading_claim: 结构化 mask 让同一次 forward 同时验旧草稿、预写新草稿
sections.state_line: TiDAR 把 prefix、上一步 draft、下一步 pre-draft 放进同一次 forward，用 AR sampling 保质量，用 diffusion pre-drafting 占用空闲 token slots。

sections.heading_claim: 质量与吞吐信号足够强，外推到平台收益仍然过早
sections.state_line: Table 2/3/4 支持“值得复现”，Figure 4 支持“优先复测 efficiency-quality frontier”，但 production scheduler 与高 batch 情况仍未被证明。

sections.heading_claim: 下一步应复测三个门槛：质量、吞吐、serving 假设
sections.state_line: deck 后续应把 TiDAR 定位为 tracking/replication candidate，而不是 deployment recommendation。

charts.question: TiDAR 的 serving 假设来自哪里？
charts.conditions: Qwen3-32B decoding, NVIDIA H100, batch size 1, Flash Attention 2

data.interpretation: additional token slots carry little latency increase before compute-bound transition
latency begins rising but remains below fully compute-bound region

charts.caption_takeaway: A flat-latency region makes parallel drafting plausible, but production schedulers still need local validation.
charts.known_limits: Source figure is profiling, not an end-to-end serving workload.

charts.question: TiDAR 的并行 draft 是否优于普通 confidence decoding？
charts.conditions: full-mask models; HumanEval Avg, MBPP Avg, GSM8k
charts.caption_takeaway: At similar or higher T/NFE, TiDAR rows retain substantially stronger task scores than confidence decoding rows.
charts.known_limits: Ablation is not a full serving workload comparison.

comparison_methods.name: Classic speculative decoding
comparison_methods.positioning: separate draft model proposes tokens; base model verifies sequentially.
comparison_methods.mechanism: Use a weaker drafter to generate multiple candidate tokens, then let the stronger AR model accept or reject.
comparison_methods.representative_evidence: Table 1 marks separate draft model, low drafting capacity, and no parallel-to-verification behavior.
comparison_methods.boundary: Attractive when compatible drafter exists; weak drafter can limit acceptance and speedup.
comparison_methods.relationship: TiDAR argues for a stronger shared drafter and parallel pre-drafting instead of a weak external drafter.

comparison_methods.name: EAGLE-3 / speculative head line
comparison_methods.positioning: stronger draft head attached to AR model family.
comparison_methods.mechanism: Use extra layers/heads to draft with mid capacity, then verify through AR path.
comparison_methods.representative_evidence: Table 1 places EAGLE-3 with shared base modifications but not parallel decoding parallel to verification; Figure 4 includes EAGLE-3 8B instruct points.
comparison_methods.boundary: Weight availability and model pairing matter; paper notes use of Qwen3-8B instruct EAGLE-3 weights.
comparison_methods.relationship: Primary speculative decoding comparator, but not a perfect apples-to-apples base-model comparison.

comparison_methods.name: MTP / multi-token prediction heads
comparison_methods.positioning: shared model extension that predicts multiple future tokens.
comparison_methods.mechanism: Add prediction heads/layers so a base model can draft more than one position.
comparison_methods.representative_evidence: Table 1 lists DeepSeek-V3 and Apple MTP as shared with base, mid drafting capacity, and parallel-to-verification.
comparison_methods.boundary: Still framed as AR-adjacent multi-token prediction rather than diffusion-style block pre-drafting.
comparison_methods.relationship: Closest systems neighbor in the table; TiDAR claims higher drafting capacity by using diffusion pre-drafts.

comparison_methods.name: Block Diffusion / Dream / LLaDA
comparison_methods.positioning: diffusion language model line that can decode in parallel but faces quality-parallelism tension.
comparison_methods.mechanism: Predict masked token positions in parallel; likelihood evaluation often uses Monte Carlo sampling.
comparison_methods.representative_evidence: Table 2/3 compare Block Diff, Dream, and LLaDA; Figure 4 contrasts Block Diff points with TiDAR.
comparison_methods.boundary: Quality is often best when decoding one token per forward, weakening practical parallelism.
comparison_methods.relationship: TiDAR borrows diffusion's drafting parallelism but uses AR sampling to protect output quality.

comparison_methods.name: TiDAR
comparison_methods.positioning: single-model sequence-level hybrid: think in diffusion, talk in autoregression.
comparison_methods.mechanism: One forward samples previous drafts through AR rejection sampling while pre-drafting next proposals through diffusion with structured masks.
comparison_methods.representative_evidence: Abstract and conclusion report 4.71x/5.91x throughput speedup; Table 2/3/4 and Figure 4 provide quality and efficiency comparisons.
comparison_methods.boundary: Current efficiency benchmark focuses on batch size 1; long-context efficient training and custom serving kernels are future work.
comparison_methods.relationship: Current object; strong enough for controlled replication, not yet enough for deployment recommendation.

decisions.label: 跟踪与复现
decisions.reason: Architecture and benchmark signal are differentiated enough versus speculative decoding and diffusion baselines.

decisions.label: 生产上线判断
decisions.reason: Batch size, long context, custom kernels, and scheduling assumptions remain unvalidated in local serving stack.
